auth.name: Name
auth.failedLoginDescription: Check your email and password, then try again.
auth.failedRegisterDescription: Please check the form and try again.

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordLetter: The password must contain at least one letter.
validation.passwordNumber: The password must contain at least one number.

dashboardHome.title: Choose what you want to create today
dashboardHome.description: Start with a conversation, generate code, write content, clean up images, or review a resume. Each tool is tuned for a specific job, so you do not have to start from a blank prompt.
steps: Choose a tool from the cards or sidebar
Paste your brief, text, code, or image
Review the result and save the useful version
dashboardHome.workflows: Workflows for writing, coding, images, and review
dashboardHome.libraryDescription: Pick the closest workflow now. You can switch tools later from the sidebar without losing the workspace context.

conversation.description: Ask questions, unpack ideas, compare options, or turn rough notes into a clear next step.

code.description: Draft components, explain errors, refactor snippets, and move from intent to working code faster.

article.description: Create structured drafts with a useful outline, sharper sections, and cleaner transitions.

blog.description: Generate specific title angles for search, newsletters, product updates, and social posts.

background.description: Clean up product shots, profile photos, and campaign images without manual masking.

object.description: Erase unwanted objects from photos while keeping the surrounding scene natural.

resume.description: Get a practical review of structure, wording, role fit, and missing proof points.

chat.conversationTitle: Talk through an idea before you build it.
chat.conversationDescription: A focused chat workspace for strategy, product notes, prompt drafts, and quick reasoning.
chat.conversationEmptyDescription: Describe the product idea, workflow, copy problem, or customer question. Kairox will help shape it into something useful.
chat.conversationPlaceholder: Ask Kairox AI about your product, code, copy, or customer problem...
chat.codeTitle: Talk through the code you need.
chat.codeDescription: Ask for components, server routes, composables, refactors, or explanations. No setup panels, just a focused coding chat.
chat.codeEmptyDescription: Paste a snippet, describe a bug, or ask for a small implementation plan. Kairox will answer in the chat.
chat.codePlaceholder: Ask Kairox AI about a component, API handler, TypeScript type, bug, or refactor...

suggestions.checklist: Write a launch checklist for the dashboard
suggestions.compare: Compare GPT-5 Nano and Mini for support replies
suggestions.nuxtRoute: Help me write a Nuxt server route
suggestions.splitVue: Explain how to split this Vue component

article.title: Craft a useful article from a rough topic.
article.description: Pick the scope, add a few notes, and let Kairox turn it into a structured draft you can edit.
article.topicPlaceholder: Example: how small SaaS teams can organize AI workflows
article.notesPlaceholder: Audience, angle, examples, facts, or points that must be included...
article.emptyDescription: Start with a focused topic. The generated draft will keep headings, paragraphs, and lists readable.

blog.title: Generate sharper blog title ideas.
blog.description: Enter a keyword, choose a category, and get title angles that are specific enough to edit and publish.
blog.keywordPlaceholder: Example: impact of AI on human life
blog.emptyDescription: Try a specific keyword instead of a broad topic. Clear input usually gives stronger title angles.

background.title: Remove image backgrounds cleanly.
background.description: Upload a product shot, profile photo, or campaign image and prepare it for AI background cleanup.
background.previewDescription: Your processed image will appear here after the removal API is connected.
background.startedDescription: The processed image will appear when Cloudinary finishes the transformation.

object.title: Erase unwanted objects from photos.
object.description: Describe what should disappear, upload the image, and prepare the request for precise AI object cleanup.
object.promptPlaceholder: Example: person in the background, street sign, coffee cup...
object.previewDescription: Your object removal result will appear here after the image API is connected.
object.startedDescription: The edited image will appear when Cloudinary finishes the transformation.

errors.unsupported: Please upload a JPG, PNG, or GIF image
errors.invalidResponse: The API did not return a processed image URL.
errors.processing: Cloudinary has not finished generating the image yet. Try again in a moment.

resume.title: Get a practical resume review.
resume.description: Upload a PDF resume and Kairox will review structure, wording, proof points, and missing context.
resume.emptyDescription: Upload a text-based PDF. Scanned PDFs may not contain readable text.
resume.analyzed: Analyzed {count} PDF page | Analyzed {count} PDF pages

settings.title: Billing and plan
settings.description: Review your current plan, renewal details, and subscription settings.
settings.unavailableDescription: We could not load your plan right now. Your account has not been changed.
settings.freeDescription: You can explore every workflow with a small daily allowance. Upgrade when you need more room for regular work.
benefits: Unlimited access to every AI tool
settings.proCanceled: Your subscription is canceled, but Pro access remains available until the current billing period ends.
settings.proActive: Your Pro subscription is active. You have full access to every Kairox AI tool.
settings.receiptsDescription: Open the secure billing portal to update your payment method, download receipts, or change your subscription.
settings.checkoutError: Checkout could not be opened. Please try again.

upgradeDialog.title: Upgrade to Kairox Pro
upgradeDialog.defaultMessage: You used all 5 free generations for today.
